ab: Nga’ayho a mapolong, anini a romi’ad tayraen no Singsi kita i niyaro’ ami homong to malitengay.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: Hayo,misano ’amis kita a caciyaw to malitengay.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說阿美語。

en: A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.

ab: Akong, tayniay kami a miliso’ itisowanan.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: Ha: mafana’ay kamo to sowal no ’amis, tada nga’ay.
ch: B:你們會說阿美語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak Pangcah! That’s great!

ab: Nga’ayho a mapolong, anini aromi’ad tayraen no singsi Kita i lamelomeloan a omah a maomah.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: Masarayaray a ma^min, aka tawalen ko saka tayal.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: Hay, singsi, maalaay to niyam ko sakatayal.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.
A: You go get the bird catcher.
B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Nga’ayho a maemin, anini a romi’ad tayra kita i pinengnengan to a’adopen.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: Hayi tadanga’ay, samaanen ita ko katayra.
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Masarayray a maemin, mi’aca kako to paya.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: I a’ayaw i ono ’aya ’ayam, aikor i o ’one’oneran, paytemek han ita aminengneng.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.
A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: Cecay a tatokian itinikita a masa’opo.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.

ab: O maan ko ma’araway iso anini a romi’ad.
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: Ma’araway ako ko adihayay a ’oner, ato adihayay a ’ayam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Talaenho kako, malolayay ko o’o ako.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!
A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Tangongolay i tira, nga’ay itinisa kita a midangoy.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
